name: Google's New Business Dashboard and Beyond With Ben Fisher pt. 1
episode_summary: Ben Fisher is a Google Business Profile Diamond Product Expert, and an experienced veteran in SEO and social since 1994. He contributes to the Local Search Ranking Factors Survey and co-founded Steady Demand, which works with agencies and businesses to maximize outsourced Local SEO
episode_summary_rich_text:
What's the deal with the new Google My Business changes? Ben Fisher is an expert on all things GMB (now Google Business Profile), and on part 1 of this episode, you'll learn:

  • Google's user-forward approach to updates
  • Details about the new in-SERP GMB dashboard
  • What Google My Business changes may be coming next
